programme.title: Hot Water Ep107: Jet Sprinting V8 Superboat Championships from Cabarita Beach – New South Wales, Australia
programme.desc: Jet Sprinting from Cabarita Beach in New South Wales, Australia. V8 Unlimited Superboats are the top racing class in Jet Sprinting with the boats being unrestricted.

programme.title: Blue World Ep803: Atlantic Wolffish in Maine, USA + Cozumel’s Aerolito Cave
programme.desc: Blue World heads to northern Maine to meet a famous Atlantic wolffish couple named Bob and Jane, and learn how they catch crabs for dinner. Then Blue World travels to Cozumel to explore a cave containing some of the most unique and rare cave fauna in the world.

programme.title: World of Watersports Ep206: Poseidon Games…Hydroflight – Australia + World Kiteboarding Championships
programme.desc: Australia’s Gold Coast is home to the Poseidon Games where high-tech has birthed a new watersport called Hydroflight; then we recap the full season of the World Kiteboarding Championship Tour.

programme.title: Facing Waves Ep104: Stand-Up Paddling Puerto Rico
programme.desc: Explore the magical stand-up paddling opportunities that Puerto Rico has to offer…from a competitive race, to epic surf breaks.

programme.title: Facing Waves Ep208: Kayak Fishing Stand-Up Paddling in Puerto Rico
programme.desc: Join stand-up paddling legend Mike Simpson on his circumnavigation of Puerto Rico, and experience catching 150lb tarpon from a kayak.

programme.title: Xplash Ep105
programme.desc: Xplash brings you eye-popping water-related action from around the globe. In this episode, we’ll visit Bandon, Oregon to check out the creation of a sandy labyrinth; ride on the Billabong Clipper to surf remote locations around the globe; and get a taste of the multi-sport party known as the Swatch Free-4-Style.

programme.title: Water Matters Ep101 - Freshwater
programme.desc: Water Matters documents water-related environmental issues from around the globe as a number of the world’s best documentary filmmakers and environmental organizations share their stories regarding the planet’s water crisis as well as potential solutions for a healthier world.

programme.title: Hot Water Ep107: Jet Sprinting V8 Superboat Championships from Cabarita Beach – New South Wales, Australia
programme.desc: Jet Sprinting from Cabarita Beach in New South Wales, Australia. V8 Unlimited Superboats are the top racing class in Jet Sprinting with the boats being unrestricted.

programme.title: Blue World Ep803: Atlantic Wolffish in Maine, USA + Cozumel’s Aerolito Cave
programme.desc: Blue World heads to northern Maine to meet a famous Atlantic wolffish couple named Bob and Jane, and learn how they catch crabs for dinner. Then Blue World travels to Cozumel to explore a cave containing some of the most unique and rare cave fauna in the world.

programme.title: World of Watersports Ep206: Poseidon Games…Hydroflight – Australia + World Kiteboarding Championships
programme.desc: Australia’s Gold Coast is home to the Poseidon Games where high-tech has birthed a new watersport called Hydroflight; then we recap the full season of the World Kiteboarding Championship Tour.

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: Vivid
programme.desc: Absinthe Films’ Vivid highlights the breakout years of Travis Rice, Romain De Marchi, Nicolas Müller, and Gigi Rüf, delivering some of their most memorable early riding in a fan-favorite classic.

programme.title: Artist Profile - Scott Lenhardt
programme.desc: Artist Scott Lenhardt has kept everything he’s ever made for Burton Snowboards. Everything he’s ever done is stored in his childhood bedroom. After his year-long solo show at the Vermont Ski Snowboard Museum, he organized his archives. Just like his creative process, this film is mind blowing.

programme.title: Artist Profile - Sebo Walker
programme.desc: In 2022, the art-inspired accessories brand Slowtide launched a summer collection with Portland, Oregon-based artist and skateboarder Sebo Walker. To capture the collaboration, director Jake Price spent a day cruising around Walker’s hometown, seeing the city and learning what inspires his artwork.

programme.title: Without a Paddle
programme.desc: ‘Without a Paddle’ is a canoe film about snowboarding. Four snowboarders retrace a portion of the 19th century explorer David Thompson’s journey down the Columbia River, during one of the coldest cold snaps in Revelstoke’s recorded history. Surreal landscapes, epic paddling, deep powder, and pain.

programme.title: Without a Pedal
programme.desc: Snowboarding Alaska the hard way. An epic winter bike trip down Canada’s Cassiar Highway turns into a test of survival, obsession, and how far you’ll go for the dream.

programme.title: Northbound and Around
programme.desc: Hungry for clips and greedy for turns, Johan Rosen, Garrett “Worm” Warnick and friends spent the season leaving no line unridden and no pillow unsmashed. Driven by the most unsatisfiable of desires, finding good snow, the crew spent the season running from warm temperatures and chasing down a dream. To get to the promised land, they found themselves traveling… Northbound and Around. Featuring: Garrett Warnick, Johan Rosen, Nils Arvidsson, Ryan Paterson, Keenan Filmer, Kareem El Rafie Nils Mindnich, Jess Kimura, Bode Merrill, Ben Bilocq, Brandon Davis, Nick Khattar, Kyle Mack Edited by: Johan Rosen

programme.title: CHANNEL ZeRO
programme.desc: Released in 2020, this Absinthe Films feature highlights the unifying power of snowboarding during a divisive moment in history, celebrating a global community that refuses to be separated by physical or mental barriers.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Jamie Lynn - Dose 01
programme.desc: Jamie Lynn is an introvert. In his snowboarding and art-making, however, he’s big and expressive. Watch Episode 1 of his legendary Microdose series. Featuring Circe Wallace, Mike Hatchett, Sean Sullivan, Temple Cummins, Jason Loeb, Micah Shapiro, Colter Gerber, Apostalos and Demetrius Karabotsos.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Jamie Lynn - Dose 02
programme.desc: In Episode 2 of the Jamie Lynn series, Jamie talks about how the creativity of the artists and skateboarders Mark Gonzales and Neil Blender guides his approach to life as a snowboarder and artist. Featuring Circe Wallace, Matt Cummins, Dano Pendygrasse, Joel Gomez, Scott Sullivan, and Matt Remine.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Jamie Lynn - Dose 03
programme.desc: In Episode 3 of the Jamie Lynn Microdose series, we talk with a pioneering professional snowboarder and filmmaker, an iconic 90s shredder, and a Tahoe photographer about Jamie Lynn. Join us for tales of guts, gusto, and good jumping genes. Featuring Dave Seoane, Peter Line, and Ruben Sanchez.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Jamie Lynn - Dose 04
programme.desc: In Episode 4 of the Jamie Lynn Microdose series we talk with a handful of Jamie’s fellow athletes and industry peers about his loyalties to Sessions, Volcom, Vans, and LibTech among other sponsors. Featuring Joel Gomez, Dave Seoane, Richard Woolcott, Bryan Iguchi, Mike Parillo, and Billy Anderson.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Jamie Lynn - Dose 05
programme.desc: In Episode 5 of the Jamie Lynn Microdose series, Terje Haakonsen shares his insights on Mr. Lynn. From annual meet-ups at Mt. Baker to destinations around the world, Terje takes you there. Featuring Terje Haakonsen, Bryan Iguchi, Richard Woolcott, Ryan Immegart, Mike Parillo, and Troy Eckert.

programme.desc: We took a look at Mercedes-Benz's first convertible model in their S-class. Also: for the Chevrolet Camaro's 50th anniversary in 2016 the brand released the sixth generation of their classic. And: a mountain cruise with the Corvette C7 convertible.

programme.title: Go Green!
programme.desc: The Lexus RX 450h is the second revised full hybrid SUV by Toyota's luxury brand. Also: introducing the concept behind the Mazda Artega SE. And: BMW's pilot project ActiveE.

programme.title: Go Green!
programme.desc: In 2012, Audi presented the A1 E-Tron, a little city sportster with electric propulsion and a range extender. Also: the Hyundai Veloster. And: e-caravaning with Knaus Tabbert hybrid solutions and the Mercedes E-Class Blue Efficiency.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: Station Wagons like the Volvo V60 Polestar aren't just family vans anymore but basically very roomy sports cars. Mercedes followed a more luxurious approach with their E43 AMG T model. And: the ultimate powerhouse station wagon, the Audi RS6.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: Even though the Mercedes-AMG A45 Performmaster has just four cylinders, its sound is similar to its V8-colleagues by AMG. Also: the car tuning company MTM offers a similarly powerful alternative, based on an Audi: the RS3 R.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: What are the characteristics of a typical German car? Do stereotypes like functionality, reliability but also a certain dullness paint a realistic picture? Also, we explored if the Volkswagen Golf GTE could bring new impulses to the brand's model range.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: The Nürburgring Nordschleife is known as the toughest speedway in the world. Together with race driver Hans-Joachim Stuck we take a look at the history of this iconic race track as well as the events and record attempts that have been taking place there.

programme.title: Why Not Whitewater?
programme.desc: Welcome to Dimaro, the Rafting Center Val di Sole. Our story begins in 1982 when a group of adventurers decided to make history by being the first humans to raft down the River Noce. Not only they managed to go down the river against all odds, but they also fell in love with its beautiful landscapes and decided to share it with the rest of the world.Why Not Whitewater? takes us on a journey to the north of Italy to explore the valleys and rivers in the most adventurous ways. From canoening to kayaking and from rafting to hydrospeed, we are set to live an odyssey filled with adrenaline and fun that will leave you wondeing why not white water this summer!

programme.title: Dusi Canoe Marathon - Episode 1
programme.desc: The three-day event of the FNB Dusi Canoe Marathon is back again for the 2016 edition. Participants competing for the podium will have to trust their partners, be the best at route scouting and keep their focus until the very last moment, a task that is not easy at all. Both mental and physical preparation play a crucial part in one of the toughest paddling competitions. Relive the best moments of the 2016 edition of the Dusi Canoe Marathon.

programme.title: Speed Catamarans GC32 - Episode 2
programme.desc: Welcome to the second event of the 2021 GC32 Racing Tour. You are about to see all of the foiling action from Lagos on Portugal's beautiful Algarve! As usual, on the GC32 Racing Tour each venue has been selected to provide the best conditions for the nimble GC32s to fly at 30+ knots speeds. But - spoiler alert... in this episode you'll see them racing at almost 40 knots! Lagos is once more in the center of the sailing universe with the GC32 Lagos Cup 2. Appropriately coinciding with the Olympic Games, the event included some of the sailing's leading names, including several multiple Olympic medallists.

programme.title: La Ruta de la Sal - Ruta de la Sal 2023

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 3
programme.desc: In this episode, we focus on the French team. They dominated the KiteFoil World Series scene, with many great performances. We’ll zoom in on Axel Mazella who clinched the Kitefoil European title and his second Kitefoil World title last season. Finally, we meet four-time World Champion, Daniela Moroz, who’ll share some tips for how to gybe in the best possible way.

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 4
programme.desc: We are finally back to action! After months of waiting due to the Covid-19 pandemic, athletes and sports enthusiasts had the chance to return to some high-end performances and demanding racing; for the 2020 Formula Kite Mixed Team Relay European Championships that took place in Ebensee - Lake Traunsee, Austria. Relieve the best moments on Kite Masters.

programme.title: Surf Series: South Africa - Episode 1 - Nelson Mandela Pro
programme.desc: The first event of the South African WQS during series kicks off in Nelson Mandela Bay. Challenging conditions make it even tougher for surfers to get the vital points they need to advance. Will they have what it takes to raise to the top? Don’t miss all the action, the disappointments and victories at the start of what will be an epic African series.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E44 - 50 Glorious Years A Royal Celebration

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E01 - Diana A Portrait
programme.desc: Diana, Princess of Wales, was incredibly enchanting and unforgettable, leaving a lasting impact like no other woman of her era. Known as a fairy-tale princess, a loving wife, a dedicated mother, and a style icon, this documentary digs deeper to uncover the true person behind the endless spotlight.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila and her mother, in an emotional encounter, unite in an embrace longed for so many years. Many questions for Rosa who justifies herself by telling her that her intention was always to protect her and prevent her from being contaminated with hatred and resentment as she feels. Marcelina wanders around a park in a daze, unbalanced and nervous, after learning of her betrayal.

programme.title: La Trepadora
programme.desc: While Florencia and Fernanda accuse Victoria of the bursting of the dam that Nicolás was building, the young Guanipa assures that Federico is a criminal for having threatened the employees of Cantarrana because of their insistence in looking for a briefcase with money. Due to the presence of Antonieta and Felipe at the party to which Carmencita invited Clementina, the latter feels deceived, since she wanted to avoid a meeting with her beloved. Nearby, Carmencita interrupts Sergio to ask him to travel immediately to Cantarrana, since Victoria could be making a mistake in her eagerness to control the hacienda. When Nicolás informs his wife that the dam burst has flooded the cornfields, a furious Florencia decides to take revenge on Victoria Guanipa, and just when Victoria decides to go to look for her father, a call from her farmhands informs her that the pastures of Cantarrana are being set on fire by Florencia Zapata.

programme.title: La Trepadora
programme.desc: To avoid further confrontations between the Guanipa and Del Casal families, Sergio threatens to take control of Cantarrana from Victoria, but an imposing woman refuses to lose her land. From her new home in the United States, a worried Adelaida contacts her mother to find out if her daughter has finally forgiven Hilario. Without Victoria's consent, Sergio arrives at the hacienda Los Samanes to give Nicolás a sum of money as payment for the flooding of the cornfields caused by Victoria, who arrives at that moment; Nicolás assures that he could take Cantarrana from Victoria since the farmers in the area were harmed, but Sergio hits Nicolás hard to prevent him from doing so.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Gertrudis has the weapon to end her husband, but Marco Aurelio wakes up and she returns to reality. Don Lucio wants to know what the problem is with the dollar account. Elvis woos Virginia. Malena experiences the decline of her relationship with Pablo. Alberto makes contact with Ignacio who tells him that his grandmother mistreats him. Lorena decides to talk to Gertrudis but is petrified to see how the respectable Mrs. Corona and her brother-in-law Claudio kiss passionately.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Lorena resigns at the Corona house. Ricardo is still stunned by his mother about the million dollars they lost. Lorena; among the shelves of the antique shop discovers the figure of Gertrudis talking to the delinquent, thus confirming her terrible suspicion that it is Alberto's own mother who wants to end the life of her husband, Marco Aurelio Corona.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Magda tells Omar about the existence of Lorena's video-confession and he demands to reveal its contents. Omar appears before Pedro and tells him about the video that incriminates him in the death of Marco Aurelio Corona; Lobo can hardly hide his surprise and fury.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: En las cartas que entregó Henry a Max, Rosa Blanco dice que le arrebataron a su hija y Camila, muy ansiosa, cree que, al fin sabrá por qué su mamá la abandonó. Marcelina encuentra la caja con las cartas y al saber el contenido, alterada, ordena que las quemen.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Las cartas contienen pruebas que incriminan a Patricia y a Fausto en el asesinato de Leoncio. Camila tomará decisiones importantes, sobre todo para encontrar las cuatro mujeres que traicionaron a su mamá. Fausto tiene una grave intención: hay que matar a Rosa Blanco.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: La Madre Isabel le confirma a Camila parte de los secretos que oculta: Patricia y su cuñada María Amelia fueron las que denunciaron a su madre. Luciano recibe un sobre que contiene la foto de Camila niña, con su vestidito amarillo, y detrás, una mujer protegiéndola.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Las cuatro mujeres que destruyeron la vida de Rosa Blanco se reencuentran en una casa vacía. Camila se enfrenta a Fausto acusando a Patricia de ser la asesina de Leoncio. Otra vez un motorizado le advierte que no siga buscando a su mamá y le arrebata la carta.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Mucha confusión en Camila, nada justifica las mentiras y cada vez Camila está más decepcionada de los engaños de la Madre Isabel. Ezequiel confronta a Julia y agrede salvajemente a Gregorio al encontrarlos juntos.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: La Madre Isabel confiesa a Camila pero la muchacha sabe que aún miente. Jeli, su hermanita, sufre por la irresponsabilidad de Fernando, que la embarazó. Max anuncia a Marcelina y Astrid que pronto se casará con Camila.

programme.title: El Juego del Sexo
programme.desc: Un alienígena cambiante procedente del espacio exterior causa estragos en un pequeño pueblo rural del suroeste de Estados Unidos, cerca del legendario Área 51 de fama ovni. Estos extraterrestres son una raza devoradora de cerebros a quienes les encanta decapitar y comerse a los humanos. Están entre nosotros y lo han estado durante millones de años.

programme.title: El Duende
programme.desc: Rosalía se muda a la ciudad junto a su hijo pequeño, Ramiro. Con la ayuda de una conocida, consigue encontrar vivienda. La casa ha estado cerrada por décadas, y tiene un horno antiguo. Lo que Rosalía ignora es que dentro del horno habita un duende que tiene por costumbre robar niños.

programme.title: El Sonido de los Tulipanes
programme.desc: En Buenos Aires durante la crisis del 2001, Marcelo un escritor devenido en periodista, debe volver sobre los últimos pasos de su padre Tonio un consagrado intelectual de quien se encuentra profundamente distanciado cuando muere en condiciones extrañas.

programme.title: De La Piel del Diablo
programme.desc: La atracción se desata entre un hombre y una mujer que se conocen en una galería de arte. Comparten gustos y aficiones, y ambos parecen ser justo lo que el otro necesita… pero lo que debería haber sido una noche de pasión, pronto se convertirá en un juego perverso, lleno de trampas y mentiras, en el que nada es lo que parece.

programme.title: El Ultimo Verano
programme.desc: Carlos es un Profesor de universidad a punto de jubilarse, pero su futuro se ve en peligro porque una de sus alumnas lo acusa de haber sido acosada. Esto es solo el inicio de la peor racha de su vida ya que Carlos descubre que su esposa lo engaña y que la vida que el creía perfecta se esfuma poco a poco de sus manos... tal vez sea el ultimo verano en la vida de Carlos

programme.title: Como El Gato y El Ratón
programme.desc: El barrio de La Estrella es uno de los más pobres de Bogotá. Allí habitan ciudadanos que han sido desplazados por la guerra y la violencia. Un día y tras años de espera, la luz eléctrica llega al barrio. La gente lo celebra y, pese a oponerse el edil, deciden usarla de manera ilegal. Todo se complicará cuando dos familias tengan un conflicto por unos cables cruzados.

programme.title: Dos Abrazos
programme.desc: Cuatro personas que se ven forzadas a defenderse ante la vida, un ensimismado chico de doce años, la cajera que tiene un encuentro con él, un airado conductor de taxi y la enajenada hija de uno de sus pasajeros, se reúnen en dos abrazos.

programme.title: De La Piel del Diablo

Comparten gustos y aficiones, y ambos parecen ser justo lo que el otro necesita… pero lo que debería haber sido una noche de pasión, pronto se convertirá en un juego perverso, lleno de trampas y mentiras, en el que nada es lo que parece.

programme.title: The Man with the Golden Arm
programme.desc: Un exadicto a la heroína intenta reconstruir su vida como baterista de jazz, pero el crimen, la manipulación y la tentación amenazan con arrastrarlo de nuevo a su oscuro pasado.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes and The Secret Weapon
programme.desc: Holmes debe burlar a espías nazis y a Moriarty para salvar a un inventor de miras de bombardeo.

programme.title: The Amazing Mr. X
programme.desc: Una viuda en duelo es seducida por un espiritista que afirma poder contactar a su difunto esposo, pero nada es lo que parece.

programme.title: A Bucket of Blood
programme.desc: Un camarero de un café beatnik se convierte en un artista asesino para alimentar su nueva fama.

programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: Un sheriff intenta detener los conflictos entre colonos en el Oeste tras la Guerra Civil.
